## AbstractModelClass.findByIdAndDelete() method

Finds a single document by its ID and deletes it from the database.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static findByIdAndDelete(id: IDBValidKey, options?: QueryFindByIdAndDeleteOptions): Query<any, any>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

id


</td><td>

IDBValidKey


</td><td>

The ID of the document to find and delete.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

options


</td><td>

QueryFindByIdAndDeleteOptions


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional settings for the findByIdAndDelete operation.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Query&lt;any, any&gt;

A promise that resolves with the document that was deleted, or `undefined` if no document was found with the specified ID.

## Example


```ts
const user = await UserModel.findByIdAndDelete('123');
console.log(user);
```
